name: Baked Clams with Tasso Gratinee with Saffron
recipeIngredient: 12 medium Calms, on the half shell
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 450 degrees F. In a hot saute pan, render the Tasso for 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Add the bread crumbs, Essence, and cheese to the rendered Tasso, mix thoroughly. Season the clams with salt and pepper. Top each clam with 1 tablespoon of Tasso crust. Place the clams on a baking sheet and bake for 6-8 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown. For the Sabayon: In a mixing bowl, whisk together eggs, lemon juice, and saffron. Place the bowl over a pot of boiling water and whisk until pale in color and thick, leaving a ribbon-like trace (about 5 minutes). Season with salt and pepper. Remove clams from the oven. Place the clams on a platter and drizzle with Sabayon. Garnish with chives and peppers.
